text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out in town with Daiwa Scarlet, I walk
her back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe, we just keep goofing off all day, don't we?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
My reputation as a model student is in real
jeopardy thanks to you.
choice_data_list: But it always looks like you're having fun.
But it always looks like you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hey, now. Don't start with that. I mean, it's not like I'm not enjoying this, but...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet stops and looks up at the night sky.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
There it is... the evening star. It's always so easy
to find.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It's my favorite star, you know.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Even in the vast sky, you can spot it right away.
Shining brighter than all the others.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Always the first to appear above the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Do you think I can do it?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I can become the number one star
of the Twinkle Series?
choice_data_list: You're already number one in my eyes.
You're already number one in my eyes.
With my help, you'll be there in no time.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
How odd. Just hearing you say that fills my heart
with confidence.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You've always believed in me, right from the very
start.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And you've always been there to tell me I can
make it to number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'll do it. I'll become the star you know I can be!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So don't go anywhere, all right? You're my trusty
trainer, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Daiwa Scarlet so earnest reaffirms my
desire to help her achieve her goal.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: H-how can you say that stuff with a straight face?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Although, well... it's not like I hate it or anything. After all, it means you believe in me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And it makes me feel like I can keep being your
number one. Like I can become number one for
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So don't go anywhere, okay? I'm counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I vow to do everything in my power
to support her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you make it sound so easy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But then again, I wouldn't expect any less from
my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Don't get the wrong idea, though. Your hard work
won't get me there on its own.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's a team effort. But with your help, I'll become
the brightest star in the sky!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I vow in my heart to make her number one.
